suggested_title: Shreeja Patel - MD, NYU Grossman School of Medicine (now PGY1 General Surgery Resident)
prospect_notes: Shreeja Patel completed her undergraduate education at Emory University, where she was a member of Phi Eta Sigma Freshman Honor Society, competed on the Emory Women's Club Water Polo team, served as a Pre-Health Advising Peer Mentor, and conducted clinical research at Emory University Hospital in the Department of Gynecology and Obstetrics maintaining a patient registry and biospecimen repository. She also completed a 10-week NSF-funded research internship at the NYU Kirshenbaum Chemistry Lab during her undergrad years. She attended NYU Grossman School of Medicine, where she was inducted into the Arnold P. Gold Foundation Gold Humanism Honor Society, and graduated as part of the match cycle around 2024. She matched into General Surgery and is now a PGY1 General Surgery Resident at NYU Langone Health.

_enrichment.title: MD, NYU Grossman (now PGY1 General Surgery Resident, NYU Langone)
